title: For Journalists | U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA)
summary: This BEA 'For Journalists' page is a navigational hub listing recent and upcoming economic data releases rather than a substantive article containing specific findings. It references recent releases including Q4 2025 GDP (third estimate) and February 2026 Personal Income and Outlays, along with upcoming release dates for Q1 2026 GDP and March 2026 data.
key_points: Page is a press release/listing page, not a specific economic data release or analysis article
Recent releases include: Q4 2025 GDP third estimate, Q4 2025 corporate profits, state GDP, and February 2026 Personal Income and Outlays
Upcoming releases: Q1 2026 GDP advance estimate and March 2026 Personal Income and Outlays scheduled for 04/30/2026
Page includes press contact information and subscription links for automatic email notifications
Contains historical release schedule updates from late 2025 and early 2026
why_it_matters: This page has no standalone research or data value as it is a navigation hub. It does not contain specific economic figures, policy analysis, or market-moving information that could inform trading or research decisions.
